---
title: "STAT531 Project"
subtitle: "Jack Cryan and Lana Moore"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
execute: 
  error: true
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
```

## Reading in the data:

```{r}

url("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/manncz/stat-331-s25/main/labs/lab5/data/bCH_murder_data.Rdata") |> 
  load()

# We should probably use something like this ^



childcare_costs <- read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/master/data/2023/2023-05-09/childcare_costs.csv')

counties <- read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/master/data/2023/2023-05-09/counties.csv')

tax_rev <- read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/manncz/stat-331-s25/main/labs/lab4/data/ca_tax_revenue.csv')

# Or this style ^
```
